title: Umbrella issue: h5py C Extension Analysis Report
author: devdanzin
body:
Below is an analysis report containing some leaks, a couple unchecked malloc calls, etc. This is meant as an umbrella issue from which specific sub issues can be created. 

# h5py C Extension Analysis Report

## Findings by Priority

### FIX

#### HDF5 Handle Leaks:

- #2826
- #2827 
- #2828
- #2829
- #2830


#### Unchecked malloc (segfault on OOM):

- #2831 
- #2832
- #2833


### CONSIDER

- #2834 
- #2835 
- #2836 
- #2837 
- #2838 
- #2839 
- #2840

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body: disclosure: I asked @devdanzin privately to open fine grain issues that I'd mark as sub issues here.

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body:
@devdanzin thank you very much for reporting these. I've edited your original report and converted what was now duplicated info into a list of all sub issues so it's easier to see at a glance the current state.
Can you disclose the tool you used to find these ?

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body:
I used [cext-review-toolkit](https://github.com/devdanzin/cext-review-toolkit), a Claude Code plugin I developed. It contains Python scripts and external tools like clang-tidy, and also agents that specialize in analyzing code facets.

It's been able to find real issues in many C extensions, and a similar approach worked for CPython too: https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/146102.
